why_zh: COEX 地下主补给区，吃饭、咖啡、书店、休息点、雨天动线都在这里。
why_en: Main underground supply zone for dining, coffee, bookstore, short breaks, and rain-safe movement.
location_zh: COEX 地下连通，Samseong / Bongeunsa 均可达
location_en: Underground connection to COEX; accessible from Samseong / Bongeunsa
guide_use_zh: 会场 5 分钟内补给 / 雨天默认路线
notes: Use mall-level hours only; individual store hours vary.

why_zh: 适合 3-6 人相对正式的约饭，覆盖 casual 到 restaurant。
why_en: Good for 3-6 person meals from casual dining to restaurants.
guide_use_zh: 小组晚饭 / sponsor chat 备选
notes: Reserve or go off-peak for dinner during conference week.

why_zh: 短午休效率高，适合快速吃饭后回 poster / oral。
why_en: Efficient for short lunch gaps before returning to posters or orals.
location_en: Underground on the COEX / CALT side
notes: Expect queues at peak lunch time.

why_zh: 短聊、等人、会前咖啡；官方列出 Starbucks Reserve、Paul Bassett 等。
why_en: Coffee, short chats, and waiting point; official listings include Starbucks Reserve and Paul Bassett.
notes: Use for quick meetings, not quiet deep work.

why_zh: 好找，适合集合和短暂休息。
why_en: Easy landmark for meeting and short breaks.
notes: Busy and photo-heavy; not ideal for focused conversation.

why_zh: Parnas / InterContinental 侧，适合比 COEX Mall 稍安静的饭局。
why_en: Parnas / InterContinental side option for somewhat quieter meals than COEX Mall.
location_zh: Grand InterContinental / Samseong Station 侧，地下连通
location_en: Grand InterContinental / Samseong Station side, underground connected
guide_use_zh: 商务饭 / sponsor chat 备选
notes: Individual restaurant hours and reservations still need live checks.

why_zh: COEX 官方列 320 seats，适合较大组晚饭或啤酒。
why_en: COEX lists 320 seats; useful for larger group dinner or beer.
guide_use_zh: 大组约饭 / 晚间备选
notes: Crowding and event-week availability should be checked.

why_zh: 可连 COEX Mall、会展中心、City Airport、银行、邮局、药店、百货和酒店。
why_en: Connects COEX Mall, convention center, City Airport, banks, post office, drugstores, department store, and hotels.
location_zh: COEX / Trade Tower / Parnas 地下网络
location_en: COEX / Trade Tower / Parnas underground network
notes: Prefer underground routes in heavy rain or heat.

why_zh: 买水、零食、简单用品，也常用于 T-money 充值。
why_en: Water, snacks, simple supplies, and often T-money top-up.
notes: Write as nearby availability, not as a specific 24-hour claim.

why_zh: 感冒药、创可贴、应急处理；Starfield 有医务室，正规药局需现场确认。
why_en: Cold medicine, bandages, and basic support; Starfield has a medical room, but formal pharmacy details need live checks.
notes: Separate pharmacy from beauty drugstores; prescription medicine requires a proper pharmacy.

why_zh: 打印、胶带、笔、本子、名牌/海报应急。
why_en: Printing, tape, pens, notebooks, badge/poster emergencies.
notes: Check hours the day before relying on it for poster or badge fixes.

why_zh: 现金、银行卡问题、应急换钱。
why_en: Cash, card issues, and emergency exchange.
notes: For large exchange, airport or bank business hours are safer.

why_zh: 落地先解决韩元现金，比会场临时找换汇更稳。
why_en: Solve KRW cash on arrival instead of improvising near the venue.
location_zh: ICN T1/T2 到达 / 出发层
notes: Counters vary by terminal and provider.

why_zh: 落地办 SIM/eSIM 或取 Wi-Fi 蛋，避免会场 Wi-Fi 不稳时失联。
why_en: Get SIM/eSIM or pocket Wi-Fi on arrival to avoid relying on venue Wi-Fi.
location_zh: ICN T1/T2 到达层 / 出发层
notes: Pre-order and airport pickup can reduce queue time.

why_zh: 地铁公交、部分便利店支付；会期最常用。
why_en: Subway, bus, and some convenience-store payments; highly useful during the week.
notes: Top-up often requires cash; keep small KRW bills.

why_zh: 行李友好，直达 COEX City Airport / Samseong Exit 5。
why_en: Luggage-friendly direct route to COEX City Airport / Samseong Exit 5.
location_zh: ICN T1/T2 -> COEX，约 65 分钟，18,000 KRW
location_en: ICN T1/T2 -> COEX, about 65 minutes, KRW 18,000
notes: Schedule, fare, and boarding location should be checked close to travel time.

why_zh: 雨天备选、简单购物、地铁换乘后集合。
why_en: Rain-safe backup, quick shopping, and post-subway meeting point.
notes: Better for shopping/waiting than formal dinner.

why_zh: 厂商晚宴后续、多人晚饭、酒吧更集中。
why_en: Good for post-company-dinner continuation, group meals, and bars.
location_zh: COEX -> Gangnam / Sinnonhyeon，地铁或出租车
location_en: COEX -> Gangnam / Sinnonhyeon by subway or taxi
notes: Use Naver/Google live info for specific restaurants, queue, and private rooms.
